days.text: Very hot. Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds.
Very hot. Mainly fine. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds.
Very hot. Fine apart from cloudy periods. Force 2 to 3 southwesterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. A few thundery showers. Force 2 to 3 northerly winds, becoming east to southeasterlies with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers at first. Force 3 to 4 easterly winds.
